visual.process: Every blob was inspected in four-by-four hash-labelled contact sheets at readable resolution; original content was consulted wherever a classification or visible text needed closer inspection.

ocr.engine: RapidOCR 1.2.3 with ONNX Runtime; longest image dimension limited to 1600 pixels before recognition
ocr.selection: All ticket and demo images plus every case image containing a document, interface, or substantial visible text

visualOnly.rationale: These remain inside the visual audit; only OCR is inapplicable because they contain vehicle, workshop, or site imagery rather than a document or software surface.

ocrReview.reason: Non-document case photograph; manual visual review covered visible text, overlays, logos, and screen content.
